changelog: Fix: Windows installer now embeds correct server URL (internet_server pushed to UrBackup DB on FQDN save)
Fix: UrBackup API login handles no-password mode (no salt response)
Fix: Update Now button uses inline confirmation instead of browser-blocked window.confirm
Fix: Installer Pre-configured URL now shows FQDN instead of IP address
Fix: PUT /api/settings no longer 500 — .env file ownership corrected
